response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified 'Departure!' at 00:00 via on-screen text. Search for lyrics yielded no direct results for this specific track. 2. Identified 'ファンサ' at 02:44 via on-screen text. Performed a search: '"ファンサ" HoneyWorks Japanese and English lyrics' and successfully retrieved lyrics. 3. Mapped the scenes based on music and visual transitions. Scenes containing vocal music were assigned to the identified songs; the interlude was marked as not containing music.
response.global_summary: A video featuring VTuber Nanashi Mumei performing two songs on stage: 'Departure!' and 'Fansa', with a non-musical interlude in the middle featuring other characters.

scenes.description: Nanashi Mumei performs the song 'Departure!' on stage. Text 'Departure!' appears in the top-left.
Nanashi Mumei performs 'ファンサ' (Fansa) on stage. On-screen text indicates composition and lyrics by HoneyWorks.
